content.en:
Go!

Ye Tian decided, in a place like the Infinite Abyss, it can be called a place of great chance, it is definitely a real great chance.

If it weren't for the fact that the strong people above the True Ancestor couldn't enter, and the Infinite Abyss Fragment was very weak now, those ancient Abyss Lords and Abyss Overlords would have fallen, or would be asleep.

Otherwise, with his strength, I'm afraid he would really not be qualified to enter the core area of the Infinite Abyss Fragment.

It can be said that this may be his only chance to be here.

In addition, that place does not allow existences above the Abyss Lord level to enter, which is most suitable for his current level.

Ye Tian knew very well that it was impossible for him to stay at the half-step True Ancestor level for too long, once he entered the True Ancestor level, he would not have a chance to enter that treasure land.

All in all, he deserves to be in that place.

Moreover, his strength is strong enough, his ability to save his life is strong enough, and the possibility of encountering a death crisis is not very high.

After a while, Ye Tian came to the place that Enrodobas said.

------------

The sky and the earth of the Infinite Abyss are almost all dim colors, and even some forests are black or eerie, and there is hardly any green to be seen.

But now, Ye Tian came to an ocean, and above the ocean there is an oasis, and above the oasis is a green forest.

Such a place looks so abnormal, it does not fit the style of the Infinite Abyss at all, as if another place was forcibly embedded in the Infinite Abyss.

This is what Enrodocas calls the land of great opportunity, a place that is called the Green Forest in the mouths of many abyssal lords of the Infinite Abyss.

There is not an Abyss Monster in the Green Forest, nor an Abyss Lord, it's not that the Abyss Lord and the Abyss Monster don't care about this place, but they can't live here.

Here, they are suppressed by a force in the dark, and it is difficult for them to exert their strength, not to mention, they can't even cultivate, and once they settle here, their strength cannot be improved.

The strength cannot be improved, which is an unimaginable torture for the abyss monsters and even the abyss lord.

Therefore, there are no abyssal monsters and abyss lords in the green forest, not even a single living being, and there is silence here, which looks too weird.

Green Forest, Central.

Ye Tian descended here, staring at a black cave entrance, this cave was pitch black, and his divine sense and various means could not extend into it, so he could not observe the situation inside.

Ye Tian tried to descend into it with a clone, but as soon as the clone entered it, he completely cut off contact.

As soon as the connection was broken, the clone lost its strength support and could not last long, coupled with the unknown internal situation, soon the clone disappeared completely.

"It seems that the trick is useless, and the body must enter!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Without hesitating for long, Ye Tian resolutely entered this cave, and his figure was gradually engulfed in darkness.

A long and dark road, Ye Tian seemed to have lost the control of his body, and was constantly pulled by a force, not knowing how far he had advanced, and he didn't know how long it had passed.

Suddenly, the center of gravity suddenly became unstable, and Ye Tian fell, but quickly regained control of his body, stabilized his body, and stood on top of a green grass.

He's already in!

"What a lot of life!"

Ye Tian looked around and exclaimed.

It's like a paradise, everything is so alive and breathing, it doesn't fit in with the infinite abyss outside.

However, in the next moment, the killing machine came.

I saw a green figure appear through the void, holding a green spear, and killed Ye Tian.

This green figure is not tall, about one meter two, and even looks a little thin, but the strength of the body is extremely terrifying, and the green spear in his hand also contains the power of the terrifying law of the Great Dao, as if it can penetrate everything.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian and his opponent shook against him, Ye Tian didn't move, the other party was shocked and flew out, and the whole body exploded, but he quickly recovered under a wave of life fluctuations.

"What a terrifying recovery speed!"

Ye Tian was surprised, this was faster than the speed at which he used the Blood River True Body to recover his body.

He could sense that his blow had severely damaged the green figure, but he didn't expect the other party to recover quickly.

This is not normal!

"Copy the talent, probe!"

Under the investigation of Ye Tian's copying talent, the other party's talent situation was unobstructed.

Life Green: Meng Jiu

Strength Talent: Super God Level

Speed talent: Super god level

Defense Talent: Super God Level

Life Traceback: Super God Level

Spear Talent: No superior

Space Talent: God-level

Perception Talent: God-level

......

"Life Green?!"

Ye Tian had never heard of this race, it was very likely that it was a race unique to this place, and there was no such race outside.

The other party had a talent that Ye Tian had not encountered before, and that was super god-level life retracement.

However, it is impossible for the super god-level talent to be so perverted, it is very likely that it is because of the special nature here, which causes the life backtrace to absorb the life power here and quickly recover the body.

In this way, the Life Regression Talent can only exert a terrifying effect here, and once it returns to the outside world, it is an ordinary super-god-level talent.

But Ye Tian still copied this talent, at least it was a new talent!

Meng Jiu of the Life Green Clan was not very strong, Ye Tian first used the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to suppress the other party, and then used the illusion Endless Sinking to trap the other party's soul, and immediately began the interrogation.

The wisdom of the Life Green Clan is not very high, but it also has wisdom, and under Ye Tian's interrogation, he finally got a general understanding of some of the situation here.

According to Meng Jiu's account, the Life Green Clan is the dominant clan here, and in addition to the Life Green Clan, there are also a large number of ordinary creatures here, which are their rations and their captive livestock.

And the Life Green Clan is very powerful, for example, this Meng Jiu is only a member of the Life Green Clan's escort team, responsible for surveying this area, and is not a high-level of the Life Green Clan at all.

Just one member of the escort team is stronger than the top half-step true ancestor, although it is not as good as an abyss monster like Mo En, but it is also comparable to those disciples of the Royal Beast Sect.

It can be seen from this that the Life Green Clan is so powerful.

In the case that the Abyss Lord and the Abyss Overlord cannot enter, just some Abyss Monsters, and they have no intelligence, only the instinct for crisis, once they enter here, there is a ninety-nine percent chance of death.

Enrodobas entered here when he was at the abyss monster level, and he was indeed lucky to be able to get out alive.

"Enrodomas really has bad intentions, he probably wants to use the Life Green Clan to kill me!" Ye Tian guessed.

But one thing has to be admitted, this place is indeed very rich, such as the Merge Dao treasure, which is just an ordinary treasure here, and the Life Green Clan can easily cultivate the Merge Dao treasure.

In addition, there is also good news, that is, the Life Green Clan does not have a Dao Ancestor, this space has flaws, and the Life Green Clan also has flaws, and it has not been able to give birth to a strong person at the Dao Ancestor level.

But the Living Green Clan has true ancestors, and there are quite a few of them.
